violations.description: Ensure the contrast between foreground and background colors meets WCAG 2 AA minimum contrast ratio thresholds
violations.help: Elements must meet minimum color contrast ratio thresholds

nodes.failureSummary:
Fix any of the following:
  Element has insufficient color contrast of 3.13 (foreground color: #0a7ea8, background color: #e7d768, font size: 10.5pt (14px), font weight: bold). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1

Fix any of the following:
  Element has insufficient color contrast of 1.68 (foreground color: #ffffff, background color: #d8ca50, font size: 13.5pt (18px), font weight: normal). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1
